acceptance_gates.interpretation: Inherited from T-B8-003b public skeleton contract.
Each pilot circuit includes H plus T/RZ(pi/4) challenge-basis gates.
The old deterministic public-data transcript predictor no longer outputs a single transcript.
The analytical probability model gives one bit of entropy per challenged qubit.
Every pilot circuit has an exact small-state probability ledger.
No real backend properties or hardware execution are used.
The pilot only removes deterministic predictability; it proves no soundness theorem.
The report keeps hardware, hardness, soundness, advantage, and BQP claims false.

claim_boundary.next_gate: Attack these non-stabilizer late-bound transcripts with stronger learned/generative spoofers and then move to real backend properties or hardware execution.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: This is not hardware execution, not real backend evidence, not cryptographic soundness, not sampling hardness, not quantum advantage, and not BQP separation.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: The deterministic public-data transcript blocker from T-B8-003b is removed by adding a non-stabilizer challenge-basis layer and an exact probability ledger.
